step1.title: Welcome to Super Crew
step1.feature1: Your repo is your workspace — no extra SaaS, no data export
step1.feature2: AI agents that actually ship — they pick up tasks, do the work, deliver
step1.feature3: One board for the whole crew — humans and agents, real-time, one view
